national.name: United States
national.note: National series are seasonally adjusted (CPS). Miami series are not seasonally adjusted (LAUS).

LAUMT123310000000003.label: Unemployment Rate
LAUMT123310000000003.description: Monthly unemployment rate for the Miami–Fort Lauderdale–West Palm Beach, FL Metro Area

LAUMT123310000000005.label: Total Employment Level
LAUMT123310000000005.description: Total employed persons for the Miami–Fort Lauderdale–West Palm Beach, FL Metro Area

LNS14000000.label: US Unemployment Rate
LNS14000000.description: National civilian unemployment rate, seasonally adjusted

LNS12000000.label: US Employment Level
LNS12000000.description: National civilian employment level (thousands), seasonally adjusted
